intended_use: The NeuViz 128 Multi-Slice CT Scanner System can be used as a whole body computed tomography X-ray system featuring a continuously rotating X-ray tube and detector array. The acquired X-RAY transmissi
intended_use_full: The NeuViz 128 Multi-Slice CT Scanner System can be used as a whole body computed tomography X-ray system featuring a continuously rotating X-ray tube and detector array. The acquired X-RAY transmission data is reconstructed by computer into cross-sectional images of the body from either the same axial plane taken at different angles or spiral planes taken at different angles.
target_condition: general whole-body CT imaging applications including head, body, cardiac, and pulmonary imaging
ground_truth: Filtered Back Projection (FBP) reconstruction; clinical reader assessment using 5-point Likert scale by 3 board-certified radiologists
other_metrics: ClearView: dose reduction of head 40-50% at same image quality, body 45-60%; low-contrast detectability improvement head 30-35% at same dose, body 35-45%; noise reduction up to 55%. ClearInfinity: dose reduction of head 50-60% at same image quality, body 75-85%; low-contrast detectability improvement head 35-65% at same dose, body 60-115%; noise reduction up to 90%; spatial resolution improvement up to 1.88X (88%) at same noise.
